title: psychotria onivensis
intro: Psychotria onivensis, also known as Onivensis, is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae, which is a type of flowering plant commonly found in tropical regions. The leaves of the Onivensis plant are used in traditional medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Onivensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating infections, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. Onivensis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
